title: Graduate Scholarships
content:
Graduate Scholarships

Scholarships and Discounts for Graduate Students

Sibling Scholarship

An additional discount of 10% is given to each of the siblings studying at Üsküdar University, including siblings of graduating students.

Institution Scholarship

At the time of final enrollment in Üsküdar University's master's degree programs, a 10% discount on tuition fees is given to members of the Turkish Armed Forces, Police Force, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Family and Social Policies, University and National Education, and employees subject to 657.

Special Deprivation Scholarship

Those who grow up in the dormitories of the Ministry of Family and Social Policies receive a 50% discount.

Graduate Scholarship

Students who graduate from any undergraduate program of Üsküdar University and are placed in Üsküdar University non-thesis master's programs, except for the Clinical Psychology program, are given a 50% discount on tuition fees, and students placed in master's programs with thesis are given a 30% discount on tuition fees.

Students who are placed in the Clinical Psychology program and ranked in the top 10 in the graduation degree list in Psychology and Psychology (English) departments are given a 25% discount on tuition fees. Other graduate students placed in the Clinical Psychology program are given a 20% discount on tuition fees.

Students who graduate from any associate degree program of Üsküdar University and are placed in Üsküdar University non-thesis master's programs, except for the Clinical Psychology program, are given a 50% discount on tuition fees, and students placed in master's programs with thesis are given a 30% discount on tuition fees.

Staff Scholarship

Staff members who have been working at Üsküdar University or NP Group for at least 2 years at the time of their final registration to Üsküdar University and their parents, spouses, children and siblings are given a 50% discount on tuition fees.

A 25% discount is given to academic staff who have completed one year at the time of their final enrollment at Üsküdar University and their parents, spouses, children and siblings.

Scope and Termination of Scholarship

1) Students can benefit from only one of the scholarships/discounts of our university, except for the sibling scholarship.

2) Students who are eligible for more than one scholarship and discount can only benefit from the one with the highest amount.

3) In the event that the employment relationship of the student who receives a staff scholarship is terminated, except for the retirement of the student himself/herself, his/her mother, father, spouse, child or sibling, the staff scholarship is terminated.

4) It is obligatory for the person who benefits from the staff scholarship to continue working at the University or NP Group for at least 2 years after graduation. However, the employer reserves the right to terminate the employment relationship within this period.
